default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between FOSSA and fwd.digital for AI-driven marketing and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FOSSA has expanded its product offerings and market reach, facing new challenges in demand generation and competitor differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation, outbound marketing, and growth strategies, with a focus on leveraging existing assets like Stack Share](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in collaboration, particularly around content creation and optimizing Stack Share as a marketing asset](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Topics

### FOSSA Business Update

  - [Expanded product offerings beyond license compliance to include security scanning and SBOM management](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Facing increased competition and challenges in demand generation](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Acquired Stack Share, gaining high-traffic assets and developer tool data](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### fwd.digital's AI-Powered Marketing Approach

  - [Utilizes AI workflows for content creation, research, and personalization](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Emphasizes high-quality, efficient content production with human editor oversight](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Offers various workstreams including editorial content, programmatic SEO, and outbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Stack Share Optimization Opportunities

  - [Identified as an underutilized asset with significant potential](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2886.0)
  - [Suggestions for improving page quality, conversion rates, and leveraging developer tool data](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2891.0)
  - [Potential for creating a high-value newsletter to engage the developer community](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)

### Outbound Marketing Strategies

  - [Discussion on the challenges and limitations of cold outbound at scale](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Emphasis on value-driven outreach using Stack Share data and offerings](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
  - [Potential for high reply rates (40% claimed) when offering value upfront](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2954.0)

### Collaboration Models and Pricing

  - [fwd.digital offers various workstreams with transparent pricing](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Recommendation to start with 1-2 core workstreams before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
  - [Custom pricing available for large-scale programmatic efforts (e.g., Stack Share's 20,000 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3049.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send proposal and pricing sheet to Kevin](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3190.0)
  - [Kevin and Aaron to discuss internally and determine the scope of their first experiment with fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3194.0)
  - [Set up Slack Connect for easier communication and information exchange](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3228.0)
  - [Marcel to send the link to the meeting recording](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3233.0)
  - [Potential in-person meeting when Kevin is next in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/szfMWPyWLmmBLnmGq6mz-AkeHxGsuzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)

action_items.description: Send proposal & pricing sheet to Kevin for Growth X services
Huddle w/ Aaron to decide on first Growth X experiment & scope
Review Marcel's proposal/pricing, follow up after discussion w/ Aaron
Set up Slack Connect with Kevin & Aaron for easier communication
Send link to meeting recording to Kevin & Aaron
